name: @bespunky/nx-tools
description: BeSpunky house Nx generators: project scaffolding (serve-options, worktree-serve, serve-with-shared-browser, shared-browser, devcontainer, claude-settings, angular-ai, firebase-emulators, playwright), code scaffolding (navigation-core, domain-navigation), and reusable-tool extraction (mark-extractable, adopt-extracted); plus the serve-worktree executor (serve an in-flight git worktree without merging back — with --portOffset whole-stack isolation).
